name: Settings & Templates
description: Persists and loads application settings (model selection, timeouts, UI preferences) and task templates (reusable task configurations with pre-set flags). Supports per-project template overrides.

Managers/SettingsManager.cs.content:
class SettingsManager
  TaskTemplates: List<TaskTemplate>
  L115: LoadSettingsAsync() -> Task
  L154: SaveSettings(string? projectPath) -> void
  L180: LoadTemplatesAsync(string? projectPath) -> Task
  L203: SaveTemplate(TaskTemplate template) -> void
  L219: DeleteTemplate(TaskTemplate template) -> void

Models/SavedPromptEntry.cs.content:
class SavedPromptEntry : TaskConfigBase
  PromptText: string
  DisplayName: string

Models/TaskConfigBase.cs.content:
class TaskConfigBase : ITaskFlags
  Id: string
  Model: string
  Headless: bool
  SpawnTeam: bool
  IsFeatureMode: bool
  ExtendedPlanning: bool
  PlanOnly: bool
  IgnoreFileLocks: bool
  UseMcp: bool
  UseMessageBus: bool
  AutoDecompose: bool
  ApplyFix: bool
  FeatureModeIterations: int
  AdditionalInstructions: string
  CreatedAt: DateTime
  ActiveSkillIds: List<string>
  L37: CopyFlagsTo(TaskConfigBase target) -> void  // Copies all toggle flags from this instance to another <see cref="TaskConfigBa...
  L42: CopyFlagsFrom(AgentTaskData source) -> void  // Copies toggle flags from an <see cref="AgentTaskData"/> into this instance.
  L47: ApplyFlagsTo(AgentTaskData target) -> void  // Applies toggle flags from this instance onto an <see cref="AgentTaskData"/>.

Models/TaskTemplate.cs.content:
class TaskTemplate : TaskConfigBase
  Name: string
  Description: string
  SkipPermissions: bool
  MaxIterations: int

patterns: CopyFlagsTo/From for template application to AgentTask
Per-project template overrides layered over global settings
dependencies: Templates consumed by TaskFactory for task creation
